name: Carbon Black Response
description: This app supports executing various endpoint-based investigative and containment actions on Carbon Black Response

actions.name: Hunt File
actions.description: Hunt for a binary file on the network by querying for the MD5 hash of it on the Carbon Black Response device. This utilizes Carbon Black Response's binary search feature to look for files on the hard drives of endpoints

parameters.name: hash
parameters.description: MD5 of the binary or process to hunt

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Type of search

parameters.name: range
parameters.description: Range of items to return, for e.g. 0-10

actions.name: Create Alert
actions.description: Create an alert/watchlist

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Name of created alert/watchlist

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Type of the query

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Query to add the watchlist for

parameters.name: read_only
parameters.description: Read-only watchlist

actions.name: Update Alerts
actions.description: Update or resolve an alert

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Query to run (Carbon Black Response search language). Parameter accepts the same data as the alert search box on the Triage Alerts page

parameters.name: alert_ids
parameters.description: Unique ID of alert or comma-separated list of unique alert IDs to update

parameters.name: requested_status
parameters.description: New status of the alert(s)

parameters.name: set_ignored
parameters.description: If set to true, modifies threat report so that any further hits on IOCs contained within that report will no longer trigger an alert

parameters.name: assigned_to
parameters.description: Assign owner of alert

actions.name: Run Query
actions.description: Run a search query on the device

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Query to run (Carbon Black Response search language)

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Type of search

parameters.name: range
parameters.description: Range of items to return, for e.g. 0-10

actions.name: List Alerts
actions.description: List all the alerts/watchlists configured on the device

actions.name: List Endpoints
actions.description: List all the endpoints/sensors configured on the device

actions.name: Quarantine Device
actions.description: Quarantine the endpoint

parameters.name: ip_hostname
parameters.description: Hostname/IP of endpoint to quarantine

actions.name: Unquarantine Device
actions.description: Unquarantine the endpoint

parameters.name: ip_hostname
parameters.description: Hostname/IP of endpoint to unquarantine

actions.name: Sync Events
actions.description: Force a sensor to sync all queued events to the server

parameters.name: ip_hostname
parameters.description: Hostname/IP address to sync events for

parameters.name: sensor_id
parameters.description: Carbon Black sensor id to sync events for

actions.name: Get System Info
actions.description: Get information about an endpoint

parameters.name: ip_hostname
parameters.description: Hostname/IP address to get info of

parameters.name: sensor_id
parameters.description: Carbon Black sensor id

actions.name: List Processes
actions.description: List the running processes on a machine

parameters.name: ip_hostname
parameters.description: Name/IP of the machine to list processes on

parameters.name: sensor_id
parameters.description: Carbon Black sensor id

actions.name: Terminate Process
actions.description: Kill running processes on a machine

parameters.name: ip_hostname
parameters.description: Name/IP of the machine to terminate process on

parameters.name: sensor_id
parameters.description: Carbon Black sensor id

parameters.name: pid
parameters.description: PID of process to terminate

actions.name: Get File
actions.description: Download a file from Carbon Black Response and add it to the vault

parameters.name: hash
parameters.description: MD5 of file/sample to download

parameters.name: ph_0
parameters.description: Placeholder

parameters.name: sensor_id
parameters.description: Carbon Black sensor id to sync events for. Required for getting file from source

parameters.name: file_source
parameters.description: Source path of the file

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: When source is defined, set the byte offset to start getting the file. Supports a partial get. Optional for getting file from source

parameters.name: get_count
parameters.description: When source is defined, set the number of bytes to grab. Optional for getting file from source

actions.name: Put File
actions.description: Upload file to a Windows hostname

parameters.name: vault_id
parameters.description: Vault id of file to upload

parameters.name: destination
parameters.description: Destination path of the file (ie: C:\Windows\CarbonBlack\MyFolder\filename)

parameters.name: sensor_id
parameters.description: Carbon Black sensor id to sync events for

actions.name: Run Command
actions.description: Issue a Carbon Black Response command by providing the command name and the command's parameters as the 'data'

parameters.name: sensor_id
parameters.description: Carbon Black sensor id to sync events for

parameters.name: command
parameters.description: Command to run

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: JSON formatted body. Refer to Carbon Black REST API for command parameters

actions.name: Execute Program
actions.description: Execute a process

parameters.name: sensor_id
parameters.description: Carbon Black sensor id to sync events for

parameters.name: entire_executable_path
parameters.description: Path and command line of the executable

parameters.name: output_file
parameters.description: File that STDERR and STDOUT will be redirected to

parameters.name: working_directory
parameters.description: The working directory of the executable

parameters.name: wait
parameters.description: Wait for the process to complete execution before reporting the result

actions.name: Memory Dump
actions.description: Memory dump for a specified path

parameters.name: sensor_id
parameters.description: Carbon Black sensor id to sync events for

parameters.name: destination_path
parameters.description: Path on endpoint to save the resulting memory dump (ie: C:\Windows\CarbonBlack\Folder)

parameters.name: compress
parameters.description: Compress the memory dump

actions.name: Reset Session
actions.description: Tell the server to reset the sensor "sensor_wait_timeout"

parameters.name: session_id
parameters.description: Carbon Black session id

actions.name: Get File Info
actions.description: Get info about a file from Carbon Black Response

parameters.name: hash
parameters.description: MD5 of file/sample to get info of

actions.name: Block Hash
actions.description: Add a hash to the Carbon Black Response blacklist

parameters.name: hash
parameters.description: MD5 of file to ban/block

parameters.name: comment
parameters.description: Comment

actions.name: Unblock Hash
actions.description: Unblock the hash

parameters.name: hash
parameters.description: MD5 of file to block

actions.name: List Connections
actions.description: List all of the connections from a given process name, PID, or Carbon Black process ID

parameters.name: ip_hostname
parameters.description: Hostname or IP

parameters.name: process_name
parameters.description: Name of process

parameters.name: pid
parameters.description: PID of process

parameters.name: carbonblack_process_id
parameters.description: Internal Carbon Black ID of process

actions.name: On Poll
actions.description: Ingests unresolved alerts into Phantom

parameters.name: start_time
parameters.description: Start of the time range, in epoch time (milliseconds). If not specified, the default is the past_days setting of the App

parameters.name: end_time
parameters.description: End of the time range, in epoch time (milliseconds). If not specified, the default is now

parameters.name: container_count
parameters.description: Maximum number of container records to query for

parameters.name: artifact_count
parameters.description: Maximum number of artifact records to query for

actions.name: Get License
actions.description: Gets the license information of the device
